title: Infrastructure as Code for Beginners (AWS CDK)
summary: AWS Developers tutorial on Infrastructure as Code fundamentals using AWS CDK with Python. The course demonstrates building a serverless REST API by first manually setting up DynamoDB, Lambda, and API Gateway through the AWS console, then automating the entire deployment using CDK with a single command.
